summary: The discv4 service divergence is rustfmt-only: boolean conditions and a long expression are reflowed and early return/continue/break expressions gain semicolons without changing discovery behavior.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 119: M	crates/net/discv4/src/lib.rs.
The isolated patch only reflows boolean expressions and adds semicolons to return, continue, break, Poll::Ready, Poll::Pending, and Err expressions.
No endpoint-proof filtering, lookup scheduling, bond/expiration checks, ENR handling, packet deduplication, rate limiting, rotator behavior, or test assertion behavior changed.
